epics.title: Phase 1: Foundation & Infrastructure
epics.notes: Phase 1 audit complete. 6 gaps identified. Closing gaps before Phase 2.

epics.title: Phase 2: Storefront — Buyer-Facing Pages
epics.notes: 18 tasks. New: buyer order tracking (2.17, 2.18). Storefront + product pages + cart + checkout.

epics.title: Phase 3: Seller Studio — Editor + Management
epics.notes: 28 tasks. Order manager now includes status timeline + seller_notes.

tasks.title: GAP 1: Create seed.sql with demo data
tasks.notes: 2 tenants, 3 themes, 10 products, 3 blog posts, 8 homepage blocks, test users

tasks.title: GAP 3: Apply migration 00007 (order detail enhancements)
tasks.notes: tracking_token, order_status_log, shipping_origins, normalize_phone(), platform_admin RLS bypass. File written.

tasks.title: GAP 4: Add CSRF middleware to write routes
tasks.notes: All POST/PUT/DELETE routes need CSRF token validation. Cookie + double-submit pattern.

tasks.title: GAP 5: Create KV namespace + R2 bucket, wire wrangler.toml
tasks.notes: KV for session/cache. R2 for tenant uploads. Update wrangler.toml bindings.

tasks.title: GAP 6: Re-verify health check — all services OK
tasks.notes: After all gaps closed, run full health check. DB + KV + R2 + Auth.
